YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_DAGGER.description: A type of [gold]Stance[/gold]. Cards with [gold]Dagger[/gold] deal 1 [gold]Bleed[/gold] to the target on hit. Playing a [gold]Dagger[/gold] card grants 1 [gold]Dagger[/gold] (max 12). On stance exit, deal 4 damage to a random enemy, repeated [gold]Dagger[/gold] times.
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_DAGGER.title: Dagger
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_AXE.description: A type of [gold]Stance[/gold]. Cards with [gold]Axe[/gold] generally have high damage. Playing an [gold]Axe[/gold] card grants 1 [gold]Axe[/gold] (max 8). On stance exit, deal [gold]Axe[/gold] × 8 damage to the enemy with the highest HP.
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_AXE.title: Axe
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_GUN.description: A type of [gold]Stance[/gold]. Cards with [gold]Gun[/gold] generally have low damage and multi-hit attacks. Playing a [gold]Gun[/gold] card grants 1 [gold]Gun[/gold] (max 6). On stance exit, deal 4 damage to ALL enemies, repeated [gold]Gun[/gold] times.
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_GUN.title: Gun
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_SWORD.description: A type of [gold]Stance[/gold]. Playing a [gold]Sword[/gold] card grants 1 [gold]Sword[/gold] (max 1). On stance exit, gain [Energy:energyIcons()].
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_SWORD.title: Sword
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_LING_HUO.description: Cards with [gold]Nimble[/gold] are played when sent from your [gold]draw pile[/gold] or [gold]hand[/gold] to the [gold]discard pile[/gold]. If the card has an effect after [gold]Nimble[/gold], it triggers that effect instead of being played.
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_LING_HUO.title: Nimble
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_FORESEE.description: Look at the top X cards of your [gold]draw pile[/gold]. Choose any number to send to the [gold]discard pile[/gold], and return the rest to the top of your draw pile in their original order.
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_FORESEE.title: Foresee
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_STANCE.description: [gold]Stances[/gold] come in four types: [gold]Dagger[/gold], [gold]Axe[/gold], [gold]Gun[/gold], and [gold]Sword[/gold]. You can only have one [gold]Stance[/gold] at a time. Playing a card of a [gold]Stance[/gold] type enters that stance. If you already have a different [gold]Stance[/gold], you exit the current one (triggering its exit effect) before entering the new one.
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_STANCE.title: Stance
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_RETRIEVER.description: Add a number of cards from a specific [gold]card pool[/gold] to your hand.
YUNO_MOD_KEYWORD_RETRIEVER.title: Retrieve
